title: GCF: A Token-Optimized Wire Format for Structured LLM Interactions
description: GCF is a proven lossless, bidirectional text-based wire format for LLM interactions. 1,700+ evaluations across 10+ models from Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google. Comprehension: 100% on every frontier model on standard workloads; 90.7% on structurally complex code graphs (vs TOON 68.5%, JSON 53.6%). Generation: 5/5 validity on every frontier model, zero training. TOON's official decoder rejects LLM-generated output on 7 of 9 models. Token efficiency: 25.5% fewer tokens than TOON, 53% fewer than JSON across 15 real-world datasets (13/15 wins). Session deduplication (92.7% by 5th call) and delta encoding (81.2%) compound savings. Six implementations (Go, TypeScript, Python, Rust, Swift, Kotlin), all at v2.0.0 with CLIs. Bidirectional MCP proxy with session dedup, delta encoding, HTTP backend/frontend. 1B+ lossless round-trips verified across all 6 languages. JSON Schema validation works on decoded output unchanged.
